landing.subtitle: Native performance on Mobile. No install needed for Desktop. Zero Latency P2P.

receiver.title: Enter Access Key
receiver.keyboard_hint: Type access key via physical keyboard

firefox.title: Firefox Detected
firefox.desc: Firefox's "Enhanced Tracking Protection" is blocking the P2P connection.
firefox.step1: Click the Shield Icon 🛡️ in the URL bar.

errors.screen_share_unsupported: Screen Sharing not supported on this device. Try Camera mode.
errors.device_denied: Device access denied or not supported.
errors.service_error: Service error. Please try again later.

ended.title: Broadcast Ended
ended.desc: The session has been terminated by the broadcaster.

info.source_desc: CastNow is an open-source high-performance P2P engine. The source code is available on GitHub under the MIT license for community contributions and transparency.
info.privacy_intro: We value your privacy. CastNow utilizes direct **End-to-End Peer-to-Peer** connections.
info.privacy_item1: Your stream data never touches our servers.
info.privacy_item2: No recordings are stored or processed by us.
info.privacy_item3: We do not collect or sell personal demographic data.
info.terms_desc: By using CastNow, you agree that you are solely responsible for the content you broadcast.
info.terms_note: The service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. Misuse of the platform for illegal activities will result in termination of service availability.
info.support_desc: Having trouble or have questions? We're here to help. CastNow is a community-driven project dedicated to private P2P communication.
info.support_item1: Email us directly for technical support or feedback.
info.support_item2: Report bugs or request features via our GitHub repository.
